text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
My, what an immense crowd of people! New
Year's truly is lively in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Your Highness. Do you recall the promise you
made in regards to going out today?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I know. "Under no circumstances should I
stray too far from the security team"!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But there really isn't any need for concern. I also
have Trainer with m—ah!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I completely forgot! Happy New Year, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Let's make this year the best year ever!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This is the last year I have left... I want it to be full
of joy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Not a single one will remain—all you'll have is
those memories you love so much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the Queen Elizabeth II Cup, Air Shakur
pressed Fine Motion about her time limit, leaving
Fine looking rather tense.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm quite all right, you know.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I haven't forgotten about anything. The ending to
my story has been decided since the very
beginning!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: The duties of my house are absolute. Not only is it something I must do, it's also something I want to do.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Truth be told, I should be performing those duties
now. Yet here I am, able to race and visit a
Japanese shrine on New Year's! This is more than I
could have ever hoped for.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
These three years are a gift everyone has given to
me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes. A gift of the most wonderful dream, born
from the kindness of everyone around me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This time has truly been so splendid and fun! It
was truly precious and I hold it close to my heart.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm so grateful that I'll be able to return to my
duties with these precious memories.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, she's been like this from the
beginning. She doesn't see her duties as a
sacrifice—she truly wishes to do everything she
can for others.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's why I intend to enjoy every last second I
have here! I won't leave with any regrets! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm sure those are her true feelings. Still...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's quite enough serious talk! I went to
great effort to convince the captain to let me go
out, so I want to see all the magnificent things I
can today.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Would you be so kind as to escort me
somewhere this fine New Year's Day?
choice_data_list: Let's sample some New Year's cuisine.

Let's tour some shrines and pray for a
productive year.

Let's go a bit wild with some waterfall
meditation.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. I get the feeling this is going to be
wonderful! Let's hurry off! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We arrive at a high-class Japanese restaurant
approved by her security team from a list I gave
them earlier.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh! These are called "iwaibashi," right? Festive
chopsticks?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Using them symbolizes eating with the gods,
right? The gods eat from one end, while us
mortals use the other.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The length also has meaning, as it's related to the
number eight, which represents good omens in
Japan. Another thing I found interesting is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fine Motion is so well-versed in etiquette from all over the world, she actually ends up teaching me new things.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, that was thoroughly enjoyable! ♪ Thank
you for escorting me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, that sounds fun! Let's hurry off! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we begin a tour of various shrines that I
researched beforehand.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Right, that's done! On to the next one, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, are you okay? We have walked an awful lot today.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Come now, stand here and catch your breath!
There are still two left. Don't give up now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion is much more into this than I was
anticipating...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, that was thoroughly enjoyable! ♪ Thank
you for escorting me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ooh! I'd love to try that! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
A moment, if you please. Do you mean you intend
to sit under a rushing waterfall? This ritual sounds
quite dangerous. I beg you to reconsider.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that trying this without any preparation
could be dangerous. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure about this, Trainer? Having you try
it out before me... It's almost like you're my food
taster.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm worried about you! Promise you won't do
anything rash.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CRASHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer? Are you okay?! Your lips have turned
completely blue!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Standing under the waterfall turns out to be a
brutal, freezing cold experience. Having
performed the ritual in Fine Motion's place, we
leave it at that.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, that was thoroughly enjoyable! ♪ Thank
you for escorting me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Now, to show my appreciation for today, I'd like to escort you... to one of my favorite ramen shops!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Haha, because how could I not?! I mean, they're
open on New Year's! That kind of customer
service simply mustn't go unanswered!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Whoa, it's Fine Motion!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Oh my goodness... Uh, um, excuse me. I'm a big
fan!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for reaching out. I appreciate your
support!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Um, you were amazing in the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup! I'll never forget that race!
...Anyway, see ya!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: You'll never forget it, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I... certainly hope not.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion casts her eyes downwards for a
moment, but her usual bright smile quickly
returns, and we head to the ramen shop.
